questions.question: Describe the importance of controlling extraneous variables in an experiment. Provide one example of how this can be done in a design experiment.
Explain the concept of replication in an experiment. How does the number of replicates affect the reliability of the results?

A design experiment is conducted to investigate the effect of level of catalyst on the yield of a chemical reaction. The experiment involves three levels of catalyst (low, medium, high) and three replicates. If each replicate is run independently, what is the total number of experiments conducted?
